name: Story

## Summary

Brief description of what this story delivers — framed from the user's perspective. What can the user do after this story is complete?

**Milestone:** _(which milestone this belongs to, if any)_

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1 — specific and testable
- [ ] Criterion 2 — covers a key behavior or edge case
- [ ] Criterion 3 — covers an error scenario

## Branch

`story/{PREFIX}-{issue#}-short-name`

## Test Coverage

| Tier | Required | Notes |
|------|----------|-------|
| Unit tests | [ ] Yes / [ ] N/A | |
| Integration tests | [ ] Yes / [ ] N/A | |
| UI / E2E tests | [ ] Yes / [ ] N/A | |

## Plan

_Fill in before starting implementation._

## Implementation Notes

_Fill in during implementation. Key decisions, gotchas, alternatives considered._

## Test Results

_Fill in when done. Test counts, pass/fail, any manual verification._

## Files Changed

_Fill in when done. List of created/modified files._
